title: Massimo Dotti Sweater — Black
image_captions: Black long-sleeve sweater with white piping at the hem and cuffs. Neck tag reading 'Maison Margiela' Size M.
Black long-sleeve sweater with white piping at the hem and cuffs. Neck tag reading 'Maison Margiela' Size M.
Navy blue long-sleeve sweater with white piping on cuffs and hem. Neck tag reading 'Maison Margiela' Size M.
Neck tag reading Massimo Dotti. Care label showing 100% Cotton, Made in China.
Detail shot showing the cuff of a navy blue garment with two parallel white stripes and a thin black stripe. No tape measure, tags, or flaws are visible.
Vertical tape measure showing 69cm at fabric edge. Back view of black garment with white stitching detail.
Horizontal tape measure showing 59cm at the edge of black fabric and cream fleece lining.
Neck tag reading Modelo: 0907, Talla: L, Calidad: 301. Care label showing 100% cotton (algodón). Fabric edge at 4cm.
Back view showing black long-sleeve garment with striped ribbing at the hem.
enhanced_description:
Massimo Dotti Sweater — Black
Brand: Massimo Dotti
Size: None
Condition: Like New
Composition: 100% Cotton
Color: Black

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 59cm
Length: 69cm

About the Piece
A sleek, minimalist black sweater crafted from premium 100% cotton. Featuring elegant white piping accents along the cuffs and hem for a refined touch. The garment includes a cream fleece lining for added comfort and warmth.

Style Note: Minimalist Chic / Modern Essential

Key Detail: Distinctive double parallel white stripes with a thin black stripe on the cuffs; Maison Margiela style neck tag visible inside.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Massimo Dotti items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
